
### double-frees 

<!-- \lstset{
    style=small,
    language=C,
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~}},
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<3|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~}},
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~4~}{~end~}},
} -->
  

::: {.r-stack}
![](/overflow-heap/texfig/dblFree.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/dblFree.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/dblFree.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/dblFree.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


:::


### double-free expansion 

<!-- \lstset{
    style=smaller,
    language=C,
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~}},
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<3|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~}},
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~4~}{~end~}},
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<5|handout:0>]{~5~}{~end~}},
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<6|handout:0>]{~6~}{~end~}},
} -->
  

::: {.r-stack}
![](/overflow-heap/texfig/dblFreeExpand.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/dblFreeExpand.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/dblFreeExpand.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/dblFreeExpand.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/dblFreeExpand.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}


:::


### double-free notes  {.smaller}


* this attack has apparently not been possible for a while
* most malloc/new's <em>check for double-frees</em> explicitly 

   * (e.g., look for a bit in <code>size</code> data)

* prevents this issue --- also catches programmer errors
* pretty cheap
